blocks.text: Hovland at golf's fifth major — TPC Sawgrass awaits
After a T16 at the Arnold Palmer, Hovland needs a statement at THE PLAYERS. Kristoffer Reitan joins him at TPC Sawgrass — Norway's best shot at the richest title in golf.
🎮 CS2 ESL Pro League S22 — rain (FaZe) in action, ongoing
